sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104718" key="trĭ" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐ-</orth>, stem of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρεῖς,</foreign> in compds. <sense id="n104718.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">three times, thrice</tr_>:—also indefinitely, to add emphasis, e.g. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρίδουλος, τριβάρβαρος, τρίβαφος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
